summary: The protagonist, known as Alley Boss, engages in a high-stakes battle against the 3rd Rebel Knight Commander, Held, utilizing advanced skills like the Heavenly Dark Steps. After successfully defeating the commander and acquiring the powerful Dark Star sword, he proceeds to systematically dismantle the remaining rebel leaders. Meanwhile, his exploits are being broadcasted to an audience, causing shock and awe among observers and rival guilds.
key_moments: Alley Boss defeats the 3rd Rebel Knight Commander, Held, using unique sword techniques.
Alley Boss reveals the powerful Dark Star sword to his streaming audience.
The protagonist continues his momentum, defeating multiple rebel commanders in quick succession.
